'''Arcadia''' was the [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sacorrian system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="CCW" />
